The green title screen cuts to a night scene at a track stadium. Bright overhead floodlights illuminate the field and track lanes. A person in a red jacket walks on the left side of the track. Bleachers with a crowd of spectators are visible in the background behind the field goal posts.

The athlete in the black uniform with white stripes begins walking towards the right side of the frame. The camera pans to follow the movement, resulting in slight motion blur. The athlete in the black uniform with white stripes stops walking and stands on the track.
